footer.tagline: Your next job, delivered to WhatsApp.

landing.heroTitle: Your Next Job, Delivered to WhatsApp
landing.heroSubtitle: Upload your CV, set your search criteria, and receive curated job matches directly on WhatsApp — automatically.
landing.howItWorksTitle: Three Steps to Automated Job Search
landing.step1Desc: We analyze your resume to understand your skills and match you with the most relevant opportunities.
landing.step2Desc: Define your job titles, locations, and preferences. Set how often you want to receive alerts.
landing.step3Desc: Get real-time job alerts directly on WhatsApp with match scores and quick apply links.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Land Your Next Role
landing.feature1Desc: Our AI analyzes your resume and scores each job based on skills alignment.
landing.feature2Desc: We search LinkedIn, Indeed, and more — all in one unified feed.
landing.feature3Desc: Set keywords to include or exclude so you only see relevant opportunities.
landing.feature4Desc: Receive formatted job cards on WhatsApp with one-tap apply links.
landing.testimonial1: I got my current job through Jobleo. The WhatsApp alerts were so convenient — I never missed a relevant posting.
landing.testimonial2: The AI matching is surprisingly accurate. It filtered out all the noise and only sent jobs I actually wanted.
landing.testimonial3: Setup took 5 minutes. Now I get 2-3 relevant job alerts every day on WhatsApp.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to Automate Your Job Search?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of professionals getting jobs delivered to their WhatsApp.

pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
pricing.subtitle: Start free, upgrade when you need more power.

pricing.starterComingSoonTooltip: Free trial coming soon — stay tuned!
pricing.premiumTagline: Maximum power for the serious job seeker.

meta.defaultTitle: Jobleo — Your Next Job, Delivered to WhatsApp
meta.defaultDescription: Upload your CV, configure your job search, and receive curated job matches directly on WhatsApp — powered by AI.

about.missionDesc: We don't just list jobs; we engineer connections. Jobleo treats recruitment as a precision craft, moving away from cluttered dashboards toward a high-end, editorial matching experience.
about.whyZeroNoiseDesc: Email is where opportunities go to die. We bypass the clutter of newsletters and spam, delivering high-intent job matches directly to where you actually communicate.
about.whyRealTimeDesc: Instant notifications mean you're the first to apply. In a competitive market, speed isn't just an advantage — it's the requirement.
about.aiEthicsDesc: Scoring is not a judgment; it's a compass. We use proprietary algorithms to remove unconscious bias, focusing strictly on skill-to-demand alignment.
about.teamDesc: Jobleo is an independent project built to make job searching more efficient — delivering curated opportunities directly to your WhatsApp.
about.founder1Desc: Jobleo is operated as a sole proprietorship by Julian David Chisco Henao, focused on building tools that connect job seekers with the right opportunities faster.
about.storyDesc: Jobleo was built out of a simple frustration: finding relevant jobs takes too much time. By combining AI-powered matching with WhatsApp delivery, Jobleo brings the right opportunities directly to you.

profiles.jobTitlesTipBody: LinkedIn and Indeed already return all variants of your main term. Adding "Marketing Manager", "Marketing Specialist" and "Marketing Generalist" when your main term is "Marketing" doesn't bring new jobs — it just duplicates the work and slows your search. Use additional titles for genuinely different roles (e.g. if searching "Civil Engineer", adding "Project Manager" or "Site Superintendent" makes sense).
profiles.locationsTip: Select from the dropdown for accurate results. Searching "Toronto" covers all of GTA — Mississauga, Brampton, Markham and more.
profiles.locationSuggestionRequired: Please select a location from the dropdown list
profiles.locationsTipTitle: Search by province, not by city
profiles.locationsTipBody: "Ontario" already includes Toronto, Mississauga, Brampton, Hamilton and every city in the province. Searching by entire country (e.g. "Canada") returns thousands of results from distant cities you likely aren't interested in and slows the search significantly.

legal.termsContactBody: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@jobleo.app. Jobleo is operated by Julian David Chisco Henao.
legal.terms1Body: By accessing or using Jobleo ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time, and continued use of the Service constitutes acceptance of any changes.
legal.terms2Body: Jobleo is an AI-powered job matching service that delivers curated job opportunities directly to your WhatsApp. We aggregate job listings from third-party platforms including LinkedIn and Indeed, analyze them against your profile, and send relevant matches via WhatsApp notifications.
legal.terms3Body: You must create an account to use Jobleo. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information during registration and keep your account information up to date.
legal.terms4Body: Jobleo offers paid subscription plans billed monthly. Subscriptions automatically renew unless cancelled before the renewal date. Refunds are not provided for partial billing periods. You may cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings or by contacting support.
legal.terms5Body: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes. You may not use the Service to scrape or redistribute job data, impersonate other users, attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Service, or engage in any activity that disrupts or damages the Service or its users.
legal.terms6Body: All content, features, and functionality of Jobleo — including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, and software — are the exclusive property of Julian David Chisco Henao and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
legal.terms7Body: Jobleo is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy or availability of job listings sourced from third-party platforms. To the maximum extent permitted by law, Jobleo shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service.
legal.privacyContactBody: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@jobleo.app. Jobleo is operated by Julian David Chisco Henao.
legal.privacy1Body: We collect information you provide directly, including your name, email address, WhatsApp phone number, and resume content. We also collect usage data such as job matches viewed, search preferences, and interaction with WhatsApp notifications.
legal.privacy2Body: We use your information to provide and improve the Service, including matching you with relevant job listings, sending WhatsApp alerts, and personalizing your experience. We may also use your data to analyze service performance and communicate important account updates.
legal.privacy3Body: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with trusted third-party service providers (such as Supabase for database hosting and Stripe for payment processing) solely to operate the Service. These providers are contractually obligated to keep your data confidential.
legal.privacy4Body: Your resume content is used exclusively for AI-powered job matching within Jobleo. We process your CV text to extract skills and experience for matching purposes. You may delete your resume data at any time from your account settings.
legal.privacy5Body: By providing your WhatsApp number, you consent to receive job alert messages from Jobleo. You can opt out of WhatsApp notifications at any time by updating your settings or replying STOP to any message. Standard messaging rates from your carrier may apply.
legal.privacy6Body: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Service. We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data. You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time.
legal.privacy7Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time through your account settings. You may also request a copy of the data we hold about you by contacting us. We will respond to such requests within 30 days.

billing.successDesc: Your subscription is active. All features are now unlocked.
billing.successRedirect: You will be redirected to your dashboard in a few seconds.
billing.cancelDesc: No charges were made. You can upgrade whenever you're ready.
